title: Files, Paths, CSV, JSON, and Data Boundaries · Behavior Case: Python Streaming Files
summary: Import, validate, transform, and safely publish local nonprofit program data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python streaming files increment in a repeatable data-quality reporting pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Process large files incrementally and choose whole-file reads only when bounded size and simplicity justify them.
Open text or binary files with explicit mode, encoding, newline, and context-managed lifetime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
